name: source packet identity
requirement: Source packet P has the expected identity.

name: successor rule identity
requirement: Successor rule R has the expected identity.

name: target packet identity
requirement: Target packet Q has the expected identity.

name: unique successor minima
requirement: Every source row has a unique target selected by R.

name: target balance
requirement: Q target limits are balanced across 23 and 24.

name: repair signature
requirement: Q has three same-anchor rows and one carrier-incidence repair.

name: preview boundary passed
requirement: Preview boundary receipt passed before admission.

name: contract present
requirement: DAT-style finite information transport contract is present.

name: body unchanged
requirement: G900 body remains 900 vertices and 3600 edges.

name: no body mutation
requirement: Admission does not mutate body, add vertices, or add edges.

name: permission only
requirement: Admission is permission-channel only, not information transport.

name: no physical claim
requirement: Admission makes no physical transport, force, physics, or unification claim.
